message:
test(proptest): expand recorder_storage (20→55) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 35 new property tests covering clone invariants, debug validation,
field preservation, JSON structure, pretty-print roundtrip, enum JSON
string representation, cross-type non-confusion, consumer/storage lag,
and FlushStats/AppendResponse determinism. Also export strip_ansi from
output module for output_table test support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
